name: EPA+DHA older-adult chronic venous leg ulcer randomized trial registry
summary: A completed randomized triple-masked older-adult chronic venous leg ulcer trial testing EPA+DHA oral therapy with lipid mediator, cytokine, PMN activation, wound-area, recurrence, pain, and quality-of-life endpoints.
population: Adults aged 55 years and older with chronic venous leg ulcers receiving standard care
